user_story.benefit: see human-readable names instead of IDs for promotion types
user_story.capability: the system to display display names instead of internal IDs

target_persona.permissions: Can view tactics, search tactics, filter by promotion type
target_persona.context: Uses the system to view and manage tactics with promotion type information
target_persona.journey: User navigates to view tactics → searches or filters by promotion type → expects to see human-readable names instead of IDs

capability_breakdown.core_action: Display human-readable promotion type names instead of internal IDs across the UI
outputs_expected: Human-readable promotion type name displayed in tactic view
Human-readable promotion type name displayed in search results table
Human-readable promotion type name displayed in filter dropdown
state_changes: UI rendering changes to show display_name field instead of ID
side_effects: Consistent display across all views (tactic view, search table, filter select)

acceptance_criteria.verbatim: Given I am a registered Internal Requester When I view a Tactic THEN the promotion type is displayed as a human-readable name AND the display name is consistent across all views
acceptance_criteria.gherkin_scenario: View Tactic with Promotion Type Display Name
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: View promotion type as human-readable name
acceptance_criteria.value: Understand promotion type at a glance without needing to reference ID mappings

acceptance_criteria.verbatim: Given I am an Internal Requester When I search for tactics Then the search table displays promotion types as human-readable names
acceptance_criteria.gherkin_scenario: Search Results Display Promotion Type Names
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: See promotion type names in search results
acceptance_criteria.value: Quickly identify promotion types in search results without ID lookup

acceptance_criteria.verbatim: Given I am an Internal Requester When I open the select filter for promotion type Then the filter displays promotion types as human-readable names AND the Search filter works as before
acceptance_criteria.gherkin_scenario: Filter by Promotion Type Display Names
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Filter tactics by human-readable promotion type names
acceptance_criteria.value: Filter tactics intuitively using readable names while maintaining existing filter functionality
